---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an enhancement or new capability
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Description

A clear summary of the feature you would like.

## Use Case

Describe the problem or workflow this feature would address.

## Proposed Solution

How you think this could be implemented (high-level is fine).

## Alternatives Considered

Any other approaches you have thought about and why they are less suitable.
